articles.title: Huobi, Poloniex announced strategic partnership despite initial denials of a merger
articles.description: The exchanges will cooperate progressively in HT coin development, liquidity sharing and global compliance, plus Huobi will monitor Poloniex for new projects to list.

articles.title: Brazil’s Congress Passes Bill Legalizing Bitcoin, Ether Payments
articles.description: Brazil’s lower house of Congress has finally passed the long-awaited crypto bill legalizing crypto payments in the country and enabling banks to start offering services in the sector.

articles.title: Telegram sells usernames worth $50 million on the Open Network blockchain
articles.description: Telegram has sold $50 million usernames on The Open Network as the messaging app giant says it aims to capitalize on blockchain tools.

articles.title: DOGE Rallies 30% On Twitter Payments Anticipation As Elon Musk Props Up Dogecoin
articles.description: Dogecoin traded at $0.104 at press time - a gain of 6% in the past day and 30% in the last week -coming amid speculations that Twitter could use the coin for payments.

articles.title: Shiba Inu Price Prediction December 2022: No Sizeable Gains Anytime Soon
articles.description: The Shiba Inu (SHIB) price is attempting to move above a confluence of resistance levels near $0.00001. The initial readings suggest that it will be unsuccessful.

articles.title: Here’s Where Cardano (ADA) Could Bottom Out, According to Analyst Benjamin Cowen
articles.description: Popular crypto analyst Benjamin Cowen says there’s a “real risk” Cardano (ADA) could drop significantly further. In a new YouTube video, Cowen tells his 778,000 subscribers that the Ethereum (ETH) rival’s bear-market resistance band continues to provide resistance that ADA gets rejected from. The analyst also says Cardano has yet to plunge as far as […]

articles.title: Phantom pivots to Ethereum and Polygon to become a multi-chain wallet
articles.description: Phantom wallet recently announced that it was enabling functionality for assets on Ethereum and Polygon The wallet’s multi-chain strategy would focus on NFTs Phantom, a Solana-focused cryptocurrency wallet, announced it would move to other chains on 29 November. This action followed the recent difficulties Solana had had following the demise of FTX. Could the FTX […]

articles.title: Solana’s Phantom Wallet “Adding Support” for Ethereum ($ETH) and Polygon ($MATIC)
articles.description: On Tuesday (29 November 2022), Phantom, which is the most popular wallet for Solana, announced that it is adding support for Ethereum and Polygon. The Phantom team told their over 345K Twitter followers: “Phantom was actually founded with the intent of going multichain towards @ethereum , and we have been hard at work for months […]

articles.title: FTM price rebounds 50% as Fantom reveals 30 years runway (without having to sell its token)
articles.description: The Fantom Foundation's attempt to dispel concerns about potential FTX exposure has been a success thus far for FTM price.

articles.title: Nexo secures registration in Italy
articles.description: Italy grants crypto lender Nexo registration to legally provide its services to Italian citizens.

articles.title: XRP bulls unmoved by Coinbase delisting, pushes token’s price higher
articles.description: XRP still holds a bullish sentiment despite news emerging on November 29 that crypto exchange Coinbase will end the wallet … Continued

articles.title: Ripple Releases AMM DevNet, Unlocks Huge DeFi And XRP Liquidity Potential
articles.description: Ripple has announced that it has implemented the long-awaited automated market maker (AMM) feature in a devnet yesterday. Earlier this year, the RippleX team proposed the technical specification for XLS-30d. This is a protocol-native AMM that is integrated into the order book-based DEX on the XRP Ledger. Developers can now integrate their applications directly into […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Whales Load Up Over $789,000,000 in BTC in Less Than One Week: Analytics Firm Santiment
articles.description: A leading crypto analytics firm finds Bitcoin (BTC) whales are re-accumulating after selling off huge amounts of the top crypto asset in the wake of FTX’s implosion earlier this month. According to Santiment, whales have been dumping their cumulative holdings for 13 months, and addresses holding between 100 and 10,000 BTC sold off 1.36% of […]

articles.title: Dominica releases ‘world’s first’ national crypto token with Huobi, Tron
articles.description: The Commonwealth of Dominica in the Caribbean reportedly issued its national crypto token, DMC, on Tuesday, in partnership with crypto exchange Huobi Global, TronDAO and DMC Labs.

articles.title: Sam Bankman Fried Still Thinks FTT Was “More Legit” Than Most Tokens
articles.description: Here’s what SBF had to say during a phone interview after filing FTX for bankruptcy.
